channel.title: social-media on Utsab Karan
channel.description: Recent content in social-media on Utsab Karan

item.title: Images & Embeds
item.description: Images Standard Image (Markdown) Image with Title Local Image Figure Shortcode Hugo’s built-in figure shortcode gives more control over captions and linking. {{< figure src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4?w=900" alt="Mountain landscape" caption="A panoramic mountain view at golden hour." width="100%" >}} A panoramic mountain view at golden hour. YouTube Embed Using Hugo’s built-in youtube shortcode: YouTube with Custom Parameters

item.title: Images & Embeds
item.description: Images Standard Image (Markdown) Image with Title Local Image Figure Shortcode Hugo’s built-in figure shortcode gives more control over captions and linking. {{< figure src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4?w=900" alt="Mountain landscape" caption="A panoramic mountain view at golden hour." width="100%" >}} A panoramic mountain view at golden hour. YouTube Embed Using Hugo’s built-in youtube shortcode: YouTube with Custom Parameters
